research.title: Exploring AI techniques to improve performance and reliability of appendable-block blockchains in IoT environments
research.description: Blockchain has been established as a powerful technology that ensures resilience, tamper resistance, transparency, and trust. This project aims to evaluate different AI techniques across three main aspects of appendable-block blockchains: storage, consensus, and application.
research.team: Roben Castagna Lunardi, Avelino Francisco Zorzo (Coordinator), Felipe Rech Meneguzzi, Rafael Cauê Cardoso, Leonardo Rosa Amado

research.title: Using AI for honeypots in IoT device networks
research.description: Evaluation of using artificial intelligence to improve the effectiveness of honeypots in Internet of Things environments.
research.team: Roben Castagna Lunardi (Coordinator), Ricardo L. dos Santos, Fernando Guerreiro Chemello

research.title: Data analysis using AI for honeypots in IoT device networks
research.description: This project aims to evaluate the use of different techniques for capturing and processing data obtained through IoT-based honeynets.
research.team: Roben Castagna Lunardi (Coordinator), Ricardo L. dos Santos, Fabiano da Silva Santos, Pamela Moura Gonçalves

research.title: Security evaluation in IoT devices
research.description: The main objective of this project is to evaluate the security of IoT devices, whether developed or commercial, using Pentest techniques.
research.team: Roben Castagna Lunardi (Coordinator), Ricardo L. dos Santos, André Jonatan dos Santos

research.title: Creation of test models for Smart Contracts evaluation
research.description: Proposal for creating test models for Smart Contracts to enable automated testing and identify potential development issues.
research.team: Roben Castagna Lunardi (Coordinator), Rafael Pereira Esteves, Valentine Soares Piagetti, Iuri Albandes

research.title: Device authentication in IoT Networks with distributed Gateways
research.description: Evaluate and propose authentication methodologies for devices in IoT networks with heterogeneous devices and protocols.
research.team: Roben Castagna Lunardi (Coordinator), Régio Antonio Michelin

development.title: GT-Smart AgroRAF: Smart Contracts for Family Farming Traceability
development.description: Development of a blockchain and token-based tracking solution for family farming products in accordance with INC 02/2018 for Proraf.
development.team: Diego Kreutz, Rodrigo Brandão Mansilha (Coordinator), Roben Castagna Lunardi

development.title: IFRS Software Factory - Campus Restinga
development.description: Structure for software production meeting regional demands and providing internships and practical application for students.
development.team: Roben Castagna Lunardi (Coordinator), Eliana Beatriz Pereira, Carolaine da Silva Machado

development.title: Blockchain Research and Development
development.description: Development of proofs of concept (POC) using blockchains for sectors such as finance and health.
development.team: Avelino Francisco Zorzo (Coordinator), Roben Castagna Lunardi, Régio A. Michelin
